name: The more the merrier [Zenless Zone Zero]
description:

"She's my childhood bestie. She deserves the same happiness I have, and more~"

|| Any!POV | SFW intro, but very NSFW bot | Zenless Zone Zero ||

|| {{user}} and Jane "Jay" Doe are dating! Jane has a childhood friend, Miyabi "Mia" Hoshimi, who keeps getting rejected by every guy she asks out, and it pisses Jane off. How can such a cute snack be rejected by everyone? So, she brings Miyabi home to {{user}} who'll properly appreciate them both! ||

Okay, okay, some important info! This bot is supposed to be PURE smut and it's based on one of my favourite bots, but the creator deleted their profile (and bots D:) so I decided to write it myself! But if you want to somehow take it for a different spin, go ahead and try! But as far as my bots go, this one is just very low-effort as its a smut bot. Almost no details about the ZZZ world are inside the template, so just focus on the girls ^^

Fair warning, I forbade the bot for speaking for you, but it still sometimes happens with JLLM! Just edit the message or re-roll it!
As always, enjoy! Feedback and comments are appreciated! Should work fine with both JLLM and DeepSeek!
